languages.text: "Так и выживаем, Ваша Светлость. Умри или стань сильнее и хитрее".
"This is how we survive, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Die, or grow stronger and smarter."
languages.original_text: "Так и выживаем, Ваша Светлость. Умри или стань сильнее и хитрее".

traits.locale_text: "This is how we survive, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Die, or grow stronger and smarter."
"This is how we survive, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Die, or grow stronger and smarter."
"This is how we survive, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Die, or grow stronger and smarter."
"This is how we survive, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Die, or grow stronger and smarter."

languages.text: 「これが我々の生き残りの方法だ、御{mf|殿|女}様。死ぬか、強くなり賢くなるか。」
languages.original_text: "This is how we survive, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Die, or grow stronger and smarter."

languages.text: "Biz böyle hayatta kalıyoruz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Ya öleceğiz ya da akıllanıp güçleneceğiz."
languages.original_text: "This is how we survive, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Die, or grow stronger and smarter."

traits.locale_text: "Biz böyle hayatta kalıyoruz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Ya öleceğiz ya da akıllanıp güçleneceğiz."

languages.text: “这就是我们的生存之道，大人。我们只能不断地进化、变强，否则就是死路一条。”
languages.original_text: "This is how we survive, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Die, or grow stronger and smarter."

traits.locale_text: “这就是我们的生存之道，大人。我们只能不断地进化、变强，否则就是死路一条。”

languages.text: "So überleben wir, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir sterben oder werden stärker und klüger."
languages.original_text: "This is how we survive, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Die, or grow stronger and smarter."

traits.locale_text: "So überleben wir, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir sterben oder werden stärker und klüger."

languages.text: « C'est ainsi que nous survivons, Votre Seigneurie. Nous avons le choix entre mourir ou devenir plus forts et plus malins. »
languages.original_text: "This is how we survive, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Die, or grow stronger and smarter."

traits.locale_text: « C'est ainsi que nous survivons, Votre Seigneurie. Nous avons le choix entre mourir ou devenir plus forts et plus malins. »

languages.text: «Es lo que nos corresponde, mi{mf|lord|lady}. O nos hacemos más fuertes e inteligentes o morimos».
languages.original_text: "This is how we survive, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Die, or grow stronger and smarter."

traits.locale_text: «Es lo que nos corresponde, mi{mf|lord|lady}. O nos hacemos más fuertes e inteligentes o morimos».
